calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-22-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Nov-17-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: James Robertson II, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: CSR: B. Fields, #7235
David Newdorf, Esq. appeared for plaintiff(s) Schoenberg Family Law Group, P.C.
Plaintiff's Witness: Debra Schoenberg was placed under oath and direct examined.
Default has been entered against the Defendant(s).

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff(s), and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) Krittibas Ray for Judgment as follows:

Damages/Principal - $16,900.71
Prejudgment Interest - $2,798.11
Attorney's Fees - $3,626.99
Costs - $863.50
Total judgment in the amount of $24,189.31

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
